episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: Episode 1 introduces the chaotic world of Chaitanya, Rohan and Kamlesh. Chatty quits his thankless job and decides to wait for his result. Rohan struggles to find a job, a job he so desperately needs to move in with his girlfriend, Ishita. In a rather hilarious altercation with Chatty, Kammo is made to face some harsh truths and is left wondering if he can make it as an actor.
